title: mentha × langii var. ayassei
intro: Mentha × langii var. ayassei, also known as Indian mint or Chinese peppermint, is a variety of the Mentha langii plant, a hybrid of peppermint and other mint species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × langii var. ayassei include reducing nausea and vomiting, easing headaches and fever, and promoting relaxation and better sleep. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
